description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped wooden deck with a natural wood finish and visible graphic artwork on the underside. The deck is mounted with two metal trucks, each holding a pair of small, hard polyurethane wheels, which are light in color. The trucks are metallic and appear to be of the standard kingpin variety, securely fastened to the deck with visible hardware. The grip tape on the top surface is not clearly visible, but the deck's underside displays a colorful, possibly abstract or illustrative graphic. The overall construction is typical for street skateboards, designed for tricks and urban riding. The object is compact, lightweight, and built for mobility and durability in urban environments.
description: A standard wooden skateboard with metal trucks and light-colored wheels, featuring a graphic design on the underside of the deck. Built for street use, it is compact and durable.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the skateboard positioned on or near a long, black rail, with the deck's graphic partially visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the skateboard's wheels, trucks, and the side profile of the deck, with the rail visible beneath.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the skateboard and the rail, with the wheels and trucks in profile.
description_view_3: End-on view focusing on the nose or tail of the skateboard, with the rail extending away from the viewer.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The underside of the deck features a colorful, possibly abstract or illustrative graphic with red and white tones, but no clear text or branding is visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, white with no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin trucks, metallic silver color, no visible branding or unique features
